Render a flextable to a grob via gen_grob()

dot-flextable_to_grob.Rd

Sets column widths proportionally to fit the available content width, ensures a PDF-compatible font is used, then calls flextable::gen_grob() with fit = "width" and top-left justification.

Usage

.flextable_to_grob(ft_obj, content_w)

Arguments

ft_obj

A flextable object.

content_w

Available content width in inches.

Value

A flextableGrob (inherits from gTree).

On this page
